rationale.R1.2: The artifact makes precise mathematical claims—that setting α = 1/||B||_∞ guarantees ρ(αB) ≤ 1 via the Gershgorin disc theorem, and that Richardson iteration converges in fewer than 30 sweeps—which are verifiable and whose correctness is load-bearing for the technical argument.
